message:
feat(runtime): expand program loop with enhanced simulation

Runtime improvements:

**program.rs (~300 lines added):**
- Extended program loop capabilities
- Better event handling and message routing
- Enhanced subscription management
- Improved error recovery

**simulator.rs:**
- Simulator refinements for testing
- Better event injection support

**lib.rs:**
- Export adjustments for new features
- Flake detector module integration

These changes make the runtime more robust and easier
to test with deterministic simulation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
